entry.title: sync connection script (SQL Anywhere)
entry.content:
For some reason I need to delay the login process of all users.

Is it possible to build such a script and enforce this script to be executed (and wait until the script is ended before building the connection)?

 

I tried something like this, it works but async (it looks like a parallel connection is open besides the main connection):

 

CREATE or replace EVENT on_connect_event
TYPE CONNECT
HANDLER
BEGIN
message ('starting the connection');--this will be always executed

waitfor delay ('00:02:00');

message ('ending the connection');--this is not executed
END;

entry.title: Re: DB access under space of datasphere to thirdparty sys...
entry.content: Your also need to whitelist the public IP.

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Mining to improve SAPs efficiency and effectiveness
entry.content:
Process Mining is the enabler of a successful business transformation. SAP Signavio Process Intelligence provides a methodology how to apply process mining to make processes data-driven and end-to-end more effective, more efficient and customer friendly; we demonstrate how process mining in the areas of Customer Support and Cloud Operations lead to transformative decisions and significant tangible improvements.  

Click here to register.

Speaker: Máté Komáromi, Process Analytics with SAP Signavio Program lead | Business Process and Solution Management, SAP SE

entry.title: EWAにおけるSAP HANAクリティカルイシューについて
entry.content:
EWAレポートにて、14.3.5 SAP クリティカルイシューという指摘があります。
以下の通りの指摘がありました。
-----------------------------------------
以下のテーブルは、確認されたクリティカルなイシューのあるエリアの使用を示しています。使用によって結果が異なる場合があります。
"過去七日間で中止されたESH検索依頼の数"において、現在値=1、システム制限=1となっており、ステータスは異常となっております。
-----------------------------------------

いくつか確認させてください。
Q1."以下のテーブル"というのは"過去七日間で～"から始まる文言を対象としていますか？

Q2.ESHとはテーブルですか？その場合、ESHを含むテーブルは複数存在し、特定するにはトランザクションコードを使用することになりますか？

Q3.EWAレポートでは異常であっても、調査した過程で異常ではないことが判明した場合は無視してよいですか？

 

以上、宜しくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EWAにおけるSAP HANAクリティカルイシューについて
entry.content:
＞Q1."以下のテーブル"というのは"過去七日間で～"から始まる文言を対象としていますか？
→はい、ご認識の通りです。

＞Q2.ESHとはテーブルですか？その場合、ESHを含むテーブルは複数存在し、特定するにはトランザクションコードを使用することになりますか？
→ESHとはSAP HANA Enterprise Searchの略称です。
具体的な情報につきまして、3213111 - Transaction Rollback Triggered in SAP HANA 2.0 SPS06 While SQL Error not Indicating Transaction Rollbackをご参照ください。

＞Q3.EWAレポートでは異常であっても、調査した過程で異常ではないことが判明した場合は無視してよいですか？
→はい、EWAレポートはあくまで参考を提供いたしますので、異常がない場合は無視可能となります。

entry.title: Re: How to show the amounts of opportunities created in C...
entry.content:
Hello,

Maybe an old question, but still worthwhile to answer.

Within sales opportunities on the contact tab there is the colomn with the Top Influencer swirl.

This functionality can be activated as mentioned in the documentation

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/solution-guide-for-sap-sales-cloud/work-with-influencer-map?locale=en-US&q=Top+influencers#loiod279cee535d742eaa2c6651b7a59d512

After you have activated it you can play with it within your opportunities. When you press the swirl on the contact person with in your opportunities any other links with other contacts or employees are shown in a map. You can here decide to add certain influencers that are shown to your opportunity to visualize who might support you in winning the deal.

Working actively with the influencer map will show entries in the tile on the homepage. The symbols are shown on the axe of probability and expected closing date and the size is related to the expected value of the opportunity.

MJ

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP weblink
entry.content:
Dear community, 

We are a small consulting company that recently purchased the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud tenant. We have full admin access to BTP Cockpit and are trying to set up the SAP GUI weblink/Fiori Launchpad, but are not successful. 

Would appreciate it if someone could please guide us in this regard and give some tips on how we can accomplish this.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,

Pradeep

entry.title: Only supplier quotations with status 'Awarded' are allowed here , error while creating a PO from RFQ
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new in SAP MM (Using Fiori), I am trying to run a RFQ process.

I have created PR > RFQ where I added 2 bidders and from 2 bidders. I have awarded bidder 1.

However when I try to create  a PO , i am getting this error message. Also even though I have awarded one supplier but still the status is "in approval". How can I change the status to awarded?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How to show the amounts of opportunities created in C...
entry.content:
Hello,

Maybe an old question, but still worthwhile to answer.

Within sales opportunities on the contact tab there is the colomn with the Top Influencer swirl.

This functionality can be activated as mentioned in the documentation on Influencer Map.

After you have activated it you can play with it within your opportunities. When you press the swirl on the contact person with in your opportunities any other links with other contacts or employees are shown in a map. You can here decide to add certain influencers that are shown to your opportunity to visualize who might support you in winning the deal.

Working actively with the influencer map will show entries in the tile on the homepage. The symbols are shown on the axe of probability and expected closing date and the size is related to the expected value of the opportunity.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hello,

I Found that the source of all this pain is this: DB users created inside a space can not write into space schemas that are "reserved to datasphere technical DB users".

This limitation "made probably to avoid third party tools" to use Datasphere as a database acts like a boomerang between two SAP products (no transformation flow write to SAC models, SAC write back into an openSQL schema).

this is all to guarantee audit control of user activity that with database users is not captured in the integration monitor:

So we are sacrificing functionalities to not broke the "audit of user activities" and "not open Datasphere to third party tools".

Do we really want this?

By the way, the workaround is : create a modeling view + create a replication flow with a connection to the DB user schema to update the model. (if the full update is what you want).

But again another potential issue: only replication flows with full update can be scheduled.

entry.title: Re: Express Node.js Multi-tenant back end application with XSUAA with basic authentication.
entry.content:
Hi prakriti,

I have created a Multi tenant SAAS application (Non-CAP NodeJS based) and have deployed this app to SAP BTP in the Provider subaccount. Along with the application I have the saas-registry instance and xsuaa instance created in my Provider subaccount. I am also able to subscribe to this application from the Consumer subaccount.


Current Status: So far, I have successfully implemented application subscription from tenant subaccounts using the saas-registry and an xsuaa instance. I’ve also implemented the necessary logic for subscribe and unsubscribe events in the backend.

Note: This is a pure backend application, and I am not using an Approuter, as there is no frontend component involved. The application is intended to be consumed by tenant-specific backend or frontend apps via API calls.

Problems:

  1. When I subscribe app in consumer subaccount, the xsuaa instance (using tenant-mode as "shared in provider subaccount) is not automatically created in consumer subaccount.
  2. To address this, I added event for getting dependencies while subscribing in backend the code is shown in below picture.

     

  3. Also added "url" for "getDependencies" in "appUrls" and dependencies detail in SaaS configuration file as shown below.

     

  4. After these changes, I tried subscribing to the app again from the consumer subaccount got an error shown below.

     

Asking for Suggestions:

  1. How can I achieve the automatic creation of an XSUAA instance in the consumer subaccount when subscribing to the app, to ensure full isolation between consumer subaccounts?
  2. If not then how can I achieve independent OAuth 2.0 Authentication for tenants specific to their subaccount?

entry.title: Re: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders
entry.content: Yes, you can continue use Migration Cockpit to mass create PO after go-live. And 6VW is levaraging iRPA to mass create PO.

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HA...
entry.content:
Thank you for your suggestions,

Thanks to your advice, I was able to partially resolve the issue by enriching the undeploy.json file with the following two entries:

"src/gen/**/*.hdbtabledata",
"src/gen/**/*.csv"

However, I wanted to return to the initial setup to replicate the problem from the beginning. My goal is to get back to the state where I can delete the data, repopulate the file, and verify that the data is no longer being cleared.

After removing the two entries from the undeploy.json file and redeploying, I now encounter the following error:

Inserted 0 records of the data source file "myFile.csv" into the target table "MYTABLE"

However, it is not true that the data already exists or is duplicated. Do you have any idea why this might be happening?

Thank you,

Stefania

entry.title: Re: Automatic integration of Change Documents in managed...
entry.content: The documentation on SAP Help Portal only applies to SAP S/4HANA (on-prem), but not for public Cloud systems. It's likely that the change documents via API consumption will also be released for public Cloud with 2508. The roadmap mentions 2602, and as far as I understand, this refers to the full integration, including UI.

entry.title: Re: SEN and S/4 sso issue X-Frame-Options
entry.content:
It is now solved

SAP changed the allowed urls at their end. We are still using OpenID so that was not the issue.

In case others have the same issue, ask SAP to add your urls to the allowed list of urls.

entry.title: How to reference another local table(file) in a transformation flow (Object Store) SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently setting up a transformation flow in an Object Store space in SAP Datasphere. In this flow, I want to add a column to a local table(file) by referencing data from another local table (file). To achieve more flexibility, I attempted to use a Python script.

However, I couldn't find a way to access the second table from within the script without running into errors.

Has anyone found a way to reference or join another local table(file) within a Python transformation in an Object Store space?

What I tried:

1. Adding a second parameter to the transform() function (e.g., transform(data, second_table)). This resulted in an exception because Datasphere only passes one argument (data) to the function, and does not support multiple input parameters.

2. Referencing the second table directly in the script (without declaring it as a parameter). This led to an exception because the external table is not defined in the script’s scope.

I’d appreciate any ideas, workarounds, or best practices on how to achieve this in SAP Datasphere using Python transformations.

Thank you very much in advance and best regards,
Patrick

entry.title: 1H25 optional survey - no display on BizX homepage
entry.content:
Hello,

with the release 1h25 the optional surveys are now displayed on the ILX start page.
Our optional surveys have a due date of 14 days.
The survey is displayed correctly on the ILX home page.
However, it is not displayed on the BizX start page. They are included in the "My to-do" task list at the top right.
Is this a bug, or is it intended behavior?

Thank you for your feedback

entry.title: Disable/Block/Closed Plants disable from MM Procurement flows
entry.content:
Dear All,

We would like your advice regarding the following requirement:

In a SAP S4HANA IS Retail System with 700 plants (Stores & DCs) and 200.000 materials extended to those, how can we disable closed Plants from MM purchasing flows (PO, Migo, Miro), without deleting materials or plants, because we need them for reporting purposes and historical data maintenance.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create Sales Order Header text and Item Tex...
entry.content:
Hi @Sofian_Chml,

Could you please clarify where the <TYPE> parameter comes from? In the API documentation, it does not exist: Sales Order (A2A) - Text. 

I think this is the issue why text is not generated. Try to send it without a TYPE. 

Best regards

it´s available in Embedded on S/4 HANA2021?

Can configure this option but I can´t see the to split the delivery inside the Outbound Delivery Order Item More Methods FM.

Don´t know if something is missing, or this function is not valid for 2021 version.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAC - how to remove all filters on a table (or reset!)
entry.content:
Figured out 1 way:
NavigationUtils.openStory("3EF023001F7F82D4328EB80CF1AA3DC3","",[],false);

 

But it's not exactly pretty for the end user 😞

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP weblink
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your questions in the SAP Community blog.

Here’s some elements to understand what could be the origin of your issue :

1. Fiori Launchpad is already included with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition — you don’t need to set it up in BTP. The launchpad URL usually looks something like:

https://my<tenantid>.s4hana.ondemand.com/ui

 

2. If you're getting a blank page or don’t see any tiles, it’s probably because the user doesn’t have the right business roles assigned. At a minimum, try assigning something like:

  • SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR
  • SAP_BR_CONFIG_EXPERT_ALL

You can do this using the “Maintain Business Users” app inside the system (assuming you can access it).

 

3. For classic SAP GUI-style apps in the browser, you can usually use:

https://my<tenantid>.s4hana.ondemand.com/sap/bc/gui/sap/its/webgui

But keep in mind, not all GUI transactions are available in Public Cloud.

 

4. BTP Cockpit comes into play more when you’re extending the system — like building or deploying custom apps not for accessing standard Fiori or GUI.

 

5. If your system uses SAP Identity Authentication (IAS), make sure users are properly synced and assigned roles there too.

 

I hope this will help answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: BNK_MONIP (Payment not in Batch)

Unfortunately, we do not have access to SAP system and we are trying to figure this out as well.
 
How should we go forward?

Pradeep

entry.title: Re: My inbox PO enhancement with approvers as a composition
entry.content:
Hi Micha_Reisner ,

I have also the same situation. I added the field where I will put my table by following your steps. However, my table fields are not coming to the page. Also, there is another issue related to me. Due to other situations that I need to work on, I redefined all segw service and basic po and item CDS, I needed to make changes in some annotations and the system was not allowing me to create annotate view for standard cds. I think the reason for this is metadata.extensions: allow is not available in standard cds. Therefore, my current main situation fields are not coming to my page. The table field is there but there is no field.

_Approvers CDS:

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Gantt Chart Custom Widget for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Pretty cool widget Alexander,

Especially the fact to leverage SAP UI5 visuals makes it a quite different story when it comes to custom widgets, when compared to the echarts based examples, where the long term support (as well internally as externally) has to be taken in account before using such options. Until now, we would have sticked to the R widgets for special cases, to avoid handling additional libraries but this solution will make us review this point of view.

One thing I'm wondering about the widget is whether it could be made PDF exportable? Currently, it is exporting the whole structure of the widget but not the bars for the task if I set export true to the JSON file. Is that related to the table based filtering of the widget content?

entry.title: Re: There is no valid rule step for SKDV
entry.content:
Hello Jeremy! Thank you for your answer. The problem is that these settings are already configured in the Starter system with the financial statement version 1099 (DE). This one is missing in our customizing system so I assigned FPA1 to the Accounting Principles.

Now, this FPA1 now needs to be configured in Assign Semantic Tags to Financial Statement Versions. 

Unfortunately I don't have any reference how to set it up correctly.

If 1099 existed in the Customizing system it would be easy. For reference, this is how it looks like in the Starter system: 

Do you have any advice how to set up FPA1 in Assign Semantic Tags to Financial Statement Versions? 

FYI: This is for testing purposes.

Best regards,

Gabor

entry.title: Re: Integrating Open SQL Schema Tables with SAP Datasphere Space using Dataflow
entry.content:
I do not get the purpose of copying the data with a data flow.

If you drag and drop the table inside a graphical view:

- a new local table is deployed in datasphere space

- the local table in datasphere is only "a proxy" to the openSQL schema table

=> no waste of RAM + Disk to persist the data twice.

 

The only purpose whould be creating snapshots.

entry.title: Re: HOW TO GET NOTIFICATION IN MY INBOX FIORI APP WHEN PA...
entry.content: Thank you for your answer, but my need is to display this notification on SAP FIORI app : My Inbox

entry.title: Re: Regarding Fixed Asset Depreciation Areas
entry.content:
Hello again yahaha :),

And thank you for asking your questions in the SAP Community blog.

Here’s some elements to your following questions :

  • Explanations about Depreciation Areas :

 

Depreciation Area 01 - Book Depreciation

  • Purpose: This is your main accounting depreciation area.
  • Ledger: 0L (Leading Ledger)
  • Valuation View: 0FR_0001
  • Use: It reflects the depreciation posted to your general ledger in financial accounting. This is usually the one that posts real (not just statistical) values.

 

Depreciation Area 15 - Local Tax

  • Purpose: Used to calculate tax depreciation according to local tax laws.
  • Ledger: 0L
  • Valuation View: 0FR_0015
  • Use: This is typically used for reporting purposes only (not posted to the general ledger). Often marked as statistical in config.

 

Depreciation Area 92 - Tax Depreciation on Balance Sheet Values

  • Purpose: A variation of tax depreciation based on balance sheet book values.
  • Ledger: 0L
  • Valuation View: 0FR_0092
  • Use: Often used to reconcile or simulate tax treatments without altering book values.

 

Depreciation Area 93 - Difference between Book and Tax Depreciation

  • Purpose: Captures temporary differences between book and tax depreciation (e.g., for deferred tax calculation).
  • Ledger: 0L
  • Valuation View: 0FR_0093
  • Use: Typically used in countries or scenarios where deferred taxes need to be calculated (not always active by default).

 

Depreciation Area 10 - IFRS Depreciation

  • Purpose: Used to calculate depreciation in line with IFRS standards (International Financial Reporting Standards).
  • Ledger: 2L (Non-Leading Ledger)
  • Valuation View: 01FRS_0032
  • Use: Posts to the parallel ledger 2L, used for IFRS reporting if your company has to report under both local GAAP and IFRS.

Summary Table:

Dep.Ar

Ledger

Name

Purpose

Posts to GL?

01

0L

Book Deprcn

Main accounting depreciation

Yes

15

0L

Local Tax

Local tax depreciation reporting

Statistical only

92

0L

Tax Deprcn

Tax depr. based on book values

Statistical only

93

0L

Diff b/t Book/Tax

Deferred tax or special reserves

Statistical only

10

2L

IFRS

IFRS reporting (parallel ledger)

Yes (to 2L)

 

 

  • Is 90 depreciation area equivalent to 15’s ?

They can be both are often configured for tax reporting, and neither posts to the general ledger.

However, SAP might deliver them differently depending on country or content package (e.g. France vs. US vs. global template). In your case, Area 15 appears to be the standard tax area in use (valuation view 0FR_0015), so Area 90 may not be active at all — or is redundant.

 

  • Are values in the Depreciable Asset Declaration Form and Annexed Table 16 based on 01: Book Depreciation?

In many country-specific localizations like Japan, depreciation values in tax forms (like Table 16) are based on tax depreciation, not book (01).

However, if no separate tax area exists, or reporting logic maps to 01, then yes  those reports might default to area 01. You need to check your country-specific reporting settings.

 

  • What are tax depreciation areas (like 15) used for?

Tax-related depreciation areas are used for:

  • Statutory tax reporting
  • Reconciling tax and book differences
  • Generating values for official tax declarations
  • Supporting forms like corporate tax returns or depreciation listings for tax audits.

They often do not post to ledgers but serve as reference areas for reporting and reconciliation.

 

I hope those elements will help answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: One-off “fictitious” balance carryforward possible?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We switched from ECC to S/4 Utilities at the turn of the year. We did not migrate the posting documents fully historically, but only retroactively for approx. 5 years.
As a result, the cumulative balances now differ between the mini-core and our general ledger, which makes it difficult to compare balances.
Hence our question: is it possible to perform a one-off “fictitious balance carryforward” or to set a “starting balance” somewhere so that we can perform the balance carryforward again in the coming years and compare the cumulative balances between the subledger and the general ledger?

Thank you and best regards!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: One-off “fictitious” balance carryforward possible?
entry.content:
Hello!

For your specific request, I can recommend you a relative new functionality which is described in SAP FAQ note 3397786 (FAQ: Reconciliation snapshots between open items in Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable and general ledger balances). This FAQ note provides additional information about this relevant functionality.

Best regards,
Ronny

entry.title: Re: Testing of Developer Extensibility in S4hana Public C...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you have implemented developer extensibility on D80 Tenant, you can consume these in D100 Tenant.

You can refer to this blog: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, ABAP Environmen... - SAP Community

Best Regards,
Zhehui

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Escaped room. thank you once again 😀

entry.title: Re: While exporting report error message is coming in Rep...
entry.content:
The messages you're encountering in SAP SuccessFactors Report Center during export (especially when Scope = All is selected) are informational warnings.

  • Custom cells and client calculations won't be exported. Hidden rows and columns will be exported.

Cause & Explanation:

  • Custom cells: These include calculated fields added manually in the report layout (outside of the underlying query or schema).

  • Client calculations: These are totals or custom aggregates computed at the report viewer level, not from the query result.

  • Hidden rows/columns: Even if some rows/columns are hidden in the UI (for presentation), they will be included in the export when exporting with Scope = All.

Behavior:

SAP exports only raw query data, not dynamic visual manipulations or custom formatting done on the interface.

  • Zero and null suppression (in charts and in table columns) will be ignored and those values will be exported with the rest of the data.

Cause & Explanation:

  • This means if you’ve suppressed 0 or null values (e.g., to hide empty rows in the UI), these will still be included in the exported file when exporting the full data.

  • The export process bypasses UI suppression rules and retrieves everything from the underlying data.

Expected Behavior:

SuccessFactors exports complete dataset, including nulls and zeros, to preserve data integrity—especially for downstream use like Excel analysis.

Summary

  • Do not treat these messages as errors – they are informational alerts.
  • If you want to avoid exporting hidden rows/columns or suppressed values:

    • Use Scope: What I See instead of All.

I hope this helps.

entry.title: MMPV Close Preiod for Material Master Records: It is possible to booking outside the Current period
entry.content:
Hello,

it is possible to booking outside the current period or month of previous period by using the MMPV (Close Preiod for Material Master Records)? If yes, how?

Thanks for repley

Peter

entry.title: Re: Clean core _Is appending fixed domain values to standard domains clean core compliant?
entry.content: If we append domains using append feature In our S/4 HANA 2209 on SAP GUI Level, will it become non clean core complaint, and in future during any system upgrades, the two custom values will be wiped out? We want to be clean core complaint and use SAP standards, but this is a business requirement to add these custom fields to meet business needs.

entry.title: how to add multiple Purchase groups for a start condition in flexible workflow for purchase requisit
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

here i can add 1 purchase group per line.

 how to perform the following -please help me 

1.requirement is like i need to add some 100 purchase groups for a start condition?

2.if Purchase group is not equal to some set of Purchase groups ?

is not equal to is possible in flexible workflow?

guide me with these doubts

entry.title: restrict administrator to only create positions for his company
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Administrator should only create position for company "S2" (we've defined in the target population on the RBP), however, he can create positions for all companies

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi @lpb0417 would suggest you use Power Query as Nikhil stated above... until SAP ever decides to enhance this... @gerd_schoeffl ?
Please keep voting here for improved/reusable period handling and better Pivoting capability:
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/331943

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: Error AM 215 - Country changing in...
entry.content:
Hello Irene,

yes, I have looked at it and all data was correct.
While debugging the issue, I have found out that it was an internal development extension that one of our employees has added to SAPLBUPA_INTERFACE_SERVICE, the gv_class_bupa_inbound -> check_before_inbound was extended to be more specific.

The change was meant to help with the conversion of older creditors and debtors to the new business partner system. I am now talking with the responsible developer that implemented the extension. It seems they weren't aware that the migration cockpit also uses the same methods and classes in that regard. Not to say that I had knowledge about it either.

Thank you for your answer and have a nice day!

entry.title: Re: Change Credit Area details
entry.content: Hi Expert,

entry.title: Re: Quering document lines in user define values
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I don't know where you got this syntax, but you cannot use backslash. The correct version would be 

SELECT $[$38.11.0] FROM DUMMY

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: XSUAA apiaccess in multi tenancy mode
entry.content:
Hi sreehari_vpillai,

I have created a Multi tenant SAAS application (Non-CAP NodeJS based) and have deployed this app to SAP BTP in the Provider subaccount. Along with the application I have the saas-registry instance and xsuaa instance created in my Provider subaccount. I am also able to subscribe to this application from the Consumer subaccount.


Current Status: So far, I have successfully implemented application subscription from tenant subaccounts using the saas-registry and an xsuaa instance. I’ve also implemented the necessary logic for subscribe and unsubscribe events in the backend.

Note: This is a pure backend application, and I am not using an Approuter, as there is no frontend component involved. The application is intended to be consumed by tenant-specific backend or frontend apps via API calls.

Problems:

  1. When I subscribe app in consumer subaccount, the xsuaa instance (using tenant-mode as "shared in provider subaccount) is not automatically created in consumer subaccount.
  2. To address this, I added event for getting dependencies while subscribing in backend the code is shown in below picture.

     

     

  3. Also added "url" for "getDependencies" in "appUrls" and dependencies detail in SaaS configuration file as shown below.

     

     

  4. After these changes, I tried subscribing to the app again from the consumer subaccount got an error shown below.

     

     

Asking for Suggestions:

  1. How can I achieve the automatic creation of an XSUAA instance in the consumer subaccount when subscribing to the app, to ensure full isolation between consumer subaccounts?
  2. If not then how can I achieve independent OAuth 2.0 Authentication for tenants specific to their subaccount?

entry.title: Re: Cannot change Posting Date approved grpo draft
entry.content:
Hi Kamal,
Please check authorization for the user, Draft Edit Authorizations.
Thanks,
Prudhvi.

entry.title: Become an Early Adopter for Joule in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Are you ready to explore what’s next in data innovation?

The Early Adopter Care Program for Joule in SAP Datasphere is now open, offering the chance to get an early look and hands-on experience with our latest AI-powered capabilities before general release. As a participant, you’ll get exclusive first access to Joule capabilities, starting with features like space management and natural language access to all available SAP Datasphere documentation; all through an Early Adopter Care program run in close collaboration with SAP.

Ready to join?

You'll find everything you need to get started below — including program details, prerequisites, and how to sign up.

 

What is in for you?

🔹Get a quick start on Joule in SAP Datasphere
🔹Preferred message handling
🔹Dedicated development contact and project coach who will stay in contact with the project lead
🔹Option to influence direction of future releases with your feedback

 

When is it happening and how to register?

🔹Registration is open starting today
🔹Earliest Start Date:[1] May 15, 2025 (planned)
🔹Early Adopter Care Program Lead: Stefan Schares

Join us as a Customer or Partner: participation will be confirmed upon review/approval of the project scope completed in the following online form.[2]

➡️  Sign up here: using the online scoping document form.

 

What should I consider before registering?

Participation in the Early Adopter Care program is voluntary, at the sole discretion of SAP, and dependent on the following prerequisites, i.a.:

  1. Are already existing SAP Datasphere customer?
  2. Plan to use Joule in SAP Datasphere in production
  3. Willingness to become a customer reference.
  4. Are open to give regular feedback to our product management or customer success team?

 

 

[1] If you experience issues with this site or the associated links, please try using the Chrome browser

[2] Future developments are at the discretion of SAP and may be changed at any time for any reason without notice

entry.content:

  • Unable to Rename Apps in SAP Build Apps - Free Edition
  • Unable to export SAP Build Apps source (.gpg)

We waited for a resolution for weeks but to no avail. Please advise. Thank you 🙏😊...

entry.title: Re: New Member

entry.title: Re: Content Transport Using SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management Service in SAP CPI CF Environme
entry.content:
HI @narendargaddam ,

Yes, we can implement Cloud Transport Management between two different sub accounts of different trails(Global) accounts.

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Content Transport Using SAP Cloud Platform Transport Management Service in SAP CPI CF Environme
entry.content:
HI @narendranulu ,

In your case you can have single Source system and multiple target system. You just need to configure transport route accordingly this will send content to Preprod 1 and Preprod 2 parallelly from Source system.

Regards,

Nikhil

Assigning Semantic Tags to an FSV

Best regards,

Jeremy

Krishna

Best regards,

Did you find the solution?

entry.title: Re: Become an Early Adopter for Joule in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hello Klaus-Peter, Great initiative. If I would reach out for a customer of us, the question might rise, how licensing at a later stage will look like ("...Plan to use Joule in SAP Datasphere in production..."). Is the use of Joule included in the standard consumption or will it require additional CUs? Thanks, Philipp

entry.title: Create one Purchase order out of each Sales order using Stategy Group 20
entry.content:
Hello lovely SAP Community, 

ERP: S/4 Hana Public Cloud

At the moment im trying to create a Purchase Order out of one Sales order. To Achive that, we are using the MRP Process utilizing the  "MRP Job" and Afterwards the "Create Purchase Order out of Purchase Requisition job". 

Product ist Configureded with: 

Strategy Group
Make-to-order production (20)
 
After Using MRP Run + Creating Purchase Order out of Purchase Requisition, we successfully have a Purchase Order with a reference to the Sales Document! Seems perfect and works Really good for one Sales Order. 
 
We got a Problem when we start the whole Process with >1 Sales order as our goal is, to have exactly 1 Purchase Order to each Sales Order.
 
What we Aim for:
1. Positions within the Purchase order will be split by : Plant, Supplier (Configurations within the Create Purchase Order out of Purchase Requisition job" - Works like a Charm) 
2. Each Sales Order schould Create exactly 1 Purchase order 
 
However: 
If we have 2 Sales Orders the MRP Process is mixing all Sales Orders together and Creating 1 Purchase Order with Positions split by Supplier, Plant and Material. We would like to aim for 2 Purchase Order with positions Split by Supplier, Plant and Material for Each Sales order. 
 
Any Ideas how to achive an additional Split of Purchase Orders by Sales Order Reference?
 
 
Kind regards, 
Philipp

entry.title: Transferring Output Tax GL to Sales Tax Payable GL for the month
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Can you please guide me how can I transfer the Output Tax / Input Tax Balance to Sales Tax Payable GL for the month on closing date. I tried to post through FB50, F-02, FB41, but in all cases didn't post. Main reason due to which unable to post is that Output Tax / Input Tax GL linked with Sales Tax Indicator.

FB50 posting.

I will be able to post only if tax indicator is removed, but that is also not getting removed at FB50.

 

Thanks in advance for your reply.

entry.title: Re: Local Development Issue Once Multi-tenancy Added
entry.content:
Hi Steven-Mason,

I have created a Multi tenant SAAS application (Non-CAP NodeJS based) and have deployed this app to SAP BTP in the Provider subaccount. Along with the application I have the saas-registry instance and xsuaa instance created in my Provider subaccount. I am also able to subscribe to this application from the Consumer subaccount.


Current Status: So far, I have successfully implemented application subscription from tenant subaccounts using the saas-registry and an xsuaa instance. I’ve also implemented the necessary logic for subscribe and unsubscribe events in the backend.

Note: This is a pure backend application, and I am not using an Approuter, as there is no frontend component involved. The application is intended to be consumed by tenant-specific backend or frontend apps via API calls.

Problems:

  1. When I subscribe app in consumer subaccount, the xsuaa instance (using tenant-mode as "shared in provider subaccount) is not automatically created in consumer subaccount.
  2. To address this, I added event for getting dependencies while subscribing in backend the code is shown in below picture.

     

     

  3. Also added "url" for "getDependencies" in "appUrls" and dependencies detail in SaaS configuration file as shown below.

     

     

  4. After these changes, I tried subscribing to the app again from the consumer subaccount got an error shown below.

     

     

Asking for Suggestions:

  1. How can I achieve the automatic creation of an XSUAA instance in the consumer subaccount when subscribing to the app, to ensure full isolation between consumer subaccounts?
  2. If not then how can I achieve independent OAuth 2.0 Authentication for tenants specific to their subaccount?

entry.title: Re: There is no valid rule step for SKDV

DE1, DE2, DE3 (The first three FSVs)

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: New member

entry.title: Route is assigning automatically to sales order
entry.content: While creating the sales orders for a particular customer the route no. in the shipping tab is assigning automatically and the user wants this field to remain empty as it is causing them planning issues. Can someone tell how to do this, so that every time user creates sales order for this customer the route field remains empty?

entry.title: Re: Introduction
entry.content:
Welcome @KBramstedt - please check out the SAP Managed Tags and subscribe to the SF topics of interest.

You could also connect with SAP Champion, @AngelaWheeler

entry.title: Re: Bereitstellung der Formulare für die Deutsche Umsatzsteuer-Voranmeldung/Jahresmeldung 2021 in SA
entry.content:
Hallo,

das in diesem Blog Post beschriebene Vorgehen galt nur für das Jahr 2021. Das Formular für die monatliche Umsatzsteuer-Voranmeldung für 2025 ist in allen Kundensystemen vorhanden. Das Formular für die Jahresmeldung für 2025 sollte im Laufe des Jahres im Rahmen eines Releases ausgeliefert werden, wobei ich dafür keine verbindliche Aussage treffen kann.

Herzliche Grüße!

Katrin Gruber

entry.title: Re: SAC manual import and conenction with Live data
entry.content:
Hi,

This is possible when you use the file server option. Using a Cloud Connector and a Cloud Agent you can setup a file directory which is accessible to the Cloud Agent. When you create a model via the File Server you have the possibility to schedule import jobs. You can manage that there is a stable file that contains new data each time you want to import it.

I'm not sure if connecting to Google Drive or a similar cloud solutions offers the same capabilities (already).

Kind regards,
Martijn van Foeken | Interdobs

entry.title: How to separate the string for a query column custom name into two lines?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have this working simple example query in SAP Business One, which calls for all entries for a parameter (document number from all Sales Order documents) to be displayed in a column, which is then renamed:

SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "Document Number" FROM ORDR T0

Which displays a standard table with all the document numbers separated in rows for Sales Orders in a single column named "Document Number". 

My question is: how do I split the custom header string "Document Number" into two lines, so it reads

"Document

Number"

as the column name in the query result?

entry.title: file to idoc mutlireceiver based on the FLAG
entry.content:
I have a scenario here where idoc should split based on the line item and the flag as serviceFlag like 

like here we have two lines

 

and splitting should be done based on the <ServiceLevel_Flag>

 

every <ServiceLevel_Flag> should have a separate idoc.

 like <ServiceLevel_Flag>2</ServiceLevel_Flag> should be one idoc

       <ServiceLevel_Flag>3</ServiceLevel_Flag> should be another idoc and so on

Please suggest how to achieve this in SAP PO.

entry.title: Re: Custom Movement Types in Inventory Management Fiori apps - Part 2
entry.content: Hello Fatima2000, This BAdI is available for the Post Goods Receipt Fiori apps and, therefore, is not relevant for posting goods issues.

entry.title: Re: Set story filters api based on input control
entry.content:
Sure, something like this in the story prompt onButtonClick() event

console.log("StoryPopUp_1 - onButtonClick");

//Read Input Control Selection by User
var ipc1sel = InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembersWithUnbooked();

//Apply selection as Story Filter
var fds = Application.getFileDataSource("Ckili67ld2ovmu4rq3udd173n1u");
fds.setDimensionFilterWithHierarchy("Product",Alias.FlatHierarchy,ipc1sel);

//Close the Story Popup
this.close();

//Unpause the table (linked with script variable) to retrieve latest filtered data
tblplan.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(PauseMode.Off);

//Enable Planning features (Data Entry)
tblplan.getPlanning().setEnabled(true);

entry.title: Digital Manufacturing cant download SAML Metadata from Initialize Embedded Analytics
entry.content:
Hi
In Digital Manufacturing on BTP I am getting this issue below when I try to download SAML Metadata from Initialize Embedded Analytics > Configuration for Analytics.

<ErrorMessage>
<correlationId>c41f69cc-4b30-480c-9c45-44722537ea60</correlationId>
<message>Cannot find OEM tenant for tenant with ID XXXXXXX</message>
</ErrorMessage>

Where XXXXXXX is the BTP Subaccount.

The issue does not occur on other subaccounts within the same Global Account.
The only difference is that I migrated the Trust Config from SAML2 to OIDC on this BTP subaccount.

Any help with this appreciated
Thanks
Ger

entry.title: Re: Access Control - Assessment of users, roles and their restrictions
entry.content:
Hi olgavlachova, I've been used a bit to AGR_1252 and was able to extracted the organization values for the roles. However, my dilemma is how can I segregate the 2 businesses by only checking the authorization values, is it my understanding that I need to separate it by their areas - Company code, business area, plant, etc? Reviewing the organizational - some values are '*" and some does have specific values on it. After that I'm lost 😞

Yes, I still haven't talk to the Security Admin, but my Project Lead need me I think first to confirm if the current role design doesn't require modification. Thank you so much for responding to my queries. Hoping you can still able to respond to this. Have a great day!

entry.title: Re: Route is assigning automatically to sales order
entry.content:
@riteshkaushal Hello,

In SD Route customizing, you can define rules for route determination separately for sales orders and deliveries:

If you maintain entries only in the second table (delivery), route will not be determined in sales orders. However, I would strongly advice to rediscuss this requirement with business - if routes in SO are causing planning issues, probably they are incorrectly maintained in terms of data like transit time, transportation lead time etc. Without a route in SO, the backward / forward scheduling will be inaccurate.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Create one Purchase order out of each Sales order usi...
entry.content:
Hello @Phil_P ,

The standard "Create Purchase Order from Purchase Requisition" job does not support splitting purchase orders by Sales Order reference. This is because the grouping logic is primarily based on supplier, plant, and material, not the sales document.

To achieve a 1:1 relationship between Sales Orders and Purchase Orders, you would need to explore a workaround using separate MRP areas or custom logic via side-by-side extension in SAP BTP. Alternatively, consider managing this via manual PO creation based on requisition references, though this reduces automation.

Let me know if you need further support

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: HANA Calculated coulmn to derive sum of Quantity
entry.content:
Hi HANA Gurus,

Greetings.

I have a HANA Calculation View with attributes( VBELN, POSNR, Packing_Station ) Measure LFIMG(Delivered quantity). Now the requirement to create a calculated column Total Delivered Quantity (Sum of based on Packing_station value).

In this example i need to create calculated column =64+11872+4128=16062 (expected Result).

How to achive this calculation . I welcome your valuable inputs.Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Connect DWC to SAP Source System using SNC RFC
entry.content:
Hi,

Do we need to create PSE using sidadm or root user? I am trying to create but no files are generating in my directory.

entry.title: Re: Business Rules in SAP SuccessFactors: Best Practices for High-Impact Delivery
entry.content:
Nice article, thank you!

A couple more things that I find worth pointing out:

  • For entities that support country specific configuration (e.g. Job Information or Compensation Information), if you need a certain business rule only in some countries, assign the rule in the CSF data model, not in the global data model.
    Even if your rule checks the country in its condition, any rule assigned to the global data model will always be executed (and potentially not do anything if the condition isn't fulfilled). A rule assigned on country level will only run for employees assigned to this country. This improves performance for transactions on all other employees.
  • By using rule contexts (in the "Details" pop up for the respective rule assignment in BCUI), you can control whether you want your rule to execute all of the time, or only in certain transactions (such as the History UI, Imports, or Hire/Rehire UI). However, any transaction that doesn't have its own dedicated rule context yet will always execute all rules that are assigned in the data model. For example, the Hire Date Correction has no rule context of its own, so it will execute all onSave rules in the data model for an entity, even if some of these rules were configured to only execute for History UI transactions.
